display_text: Faded Broach, Tier Neutral: Neutral item providing +150 Mana and +15 Movement Speed. A stat-efficient early neutral drop that boosts mana pool for spellcasting and improves positioning speed. Particularly valuable on intelligence heroes and supports who need mana sustainability and map presence. Stats: Mana: +150, MS: +15.
